description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, cylindrical pole with a fluted base that widens for stability. At the top, it is crowned with a classic lantern-style lamp head, which has a pointed finial and ornate detailing reminiscent of Victorian or Edwardian street lighting. The lamp head is enclosed with transparent panels, likely glass, and is supported by a decorative collar. The entire structure is finished in a matte black color, giving it a timeless and elegant appearance suitable for urban streets, parks, or historical districts. The base is rounded and slightly raised, providing a sturdy foundation. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the post.
description: A tall, black, Victorian-style lamppost with a fluted base and ornate lantern head, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate lantern head, and fluted base details.
description_view_1: Side view with the same classic lantern head and slender pole, base details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, highlighting the symmetrical design and decorative finial.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lantern head and fluted base, consistent with other angles.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern with pointed finial and transparent glass panels
